title: Plastic Pipe Cutter - PVC Cutter,Heavy Duty Ratchet Type Pipe Cutter,Cuts up to 42mm PEX,PVC,PPR Plumbing Pipes,Plastic Hoses Premium Plastic Pipe Shear,Suitable for Home Working and Plumber
features: 【High Hardness Material】42mm pipe cutter is made of high-quality all-aluminum material, with excellent durability and wear resistance, high strength and hardness,good toughness, fast and sharp cutting, and is not easy to rust. Pipe cutter suitable for daily home, professional maintenance staff, plumber.

【Ergonomic Design】The handle of the plastic pipe cutter is ergonomically designed, providing a comfortable grip, reducing fatigue during long-term use.It also ensures automatic locking during the cutting process to protect the user from the rebound of the blade. The handle adopts the principle of leverage, design lightweight.

【Ratchet Drive Technology】The PVC pipecutter adopts a ratchet mechanism design to ensure smooth and controllable cutting action, reduce the risk of accidental slippage or inaccurate cutting.The ratchet drive greatly enhances the bite force. When used, the self locking is pressed to prevent the cutter from springing back, and the pipe is sharp and fast, safe and labor saving.

【Simple Operation】Put the pipe to be cut into the corresponding knife edge, and continuously clamp and tighten the handle to easily cut the pipe.At the bottom of the tube cutter, there is a stainless steel buckle for easy storage. When you don't use it, you can shrink the handles on both sides and lock the security lock to save space and prevent accidental injury.

【Wide Application】Ideal for pipes with a diameter of less than 42 mm, such as PVC, CPVC, PP, PEX, PE, rubber pipes, multi-layer pipes, etc.It is also an indispensable cutting tool for homework, decoration, plumber, electrician and car maintenance master. It is an ideal choice for family DIY.
description: Features： The 42mm pipe cutter is made of high-quality all-aluminum material, which has excellent durability and wear resistance, can remain sharp and stable during frequent use, and extend the service life of the tool The handle of the pvc pipe cutter is ergonomically designed, providing a comfortable grip and reducing fatigue during long-term use The plastic pipe cutters are designed with a ratchet mechanism to ensure smooth and controllable cutting action, reduce the risk of accidental slippage or inaccurate cutting, improve work efficiency, and ensure user safety Specification: Material: Aluminum Color/Size: Yellow Package Includes: 1 x PVC Pipe Cutter Warm Tips: Dimensions are measured manually, please allow slight errors. Color may vary slightly from the online image due to your monitor color settings, please refer to the actual product, thank you for your understanding.
